# TibiaEye

> Bot de Tibia com Dashboard em Tempo Real

TibiaEye is a pixel bot for Tibia that automates hunting, looting, and navigation while allowing you to monitor everything in real-time through a modern dashboard.

## What is a Pixel Bot?

A pixel bot is automation that works by reading the game's screen pixels in real-time. Unlike memory bots, it:
- Analyzes the screen image to identify monsters, items, HP, mana, etc.
- Simulates mouse and keyboard inputs like a real player
- Does not modify any game files
- Requires the game window to be visible

## Key Features

### Bot Features
- Intelligent pixel-based detection
- Automatic targeting with whitelist/blacklist
- Auto loot and refill management
- Spell and healing automation

### Dashboard Features
- Real-time XP/h tracking
- Live map position
- Kill and loot analytics
- Death and level-up alerts
- Session history and comparisons

## Requirements

- Windows 10/11
- Tibia client running and visible on screen
- Recommended: Second monitor or dedicated VM

## Pricing

- Starter (Free): 1 character, 7 days history
- Pro (R$29.90/month): 5 characters, 30 days history, live map
- Enterprise (R$99.90/month): Unlimited characters, webhooks, SLA

## Links

- Website: https://tibiaeye.com
- Dashboard: https://app.tibiaeye.com
- Documentation: https://tibiaeye.com/docs
- Discord: https://discord.gg/tibiaeye
